/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -pedantic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/3dview.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/3dview.dir/progs/demos/3dview/3dview.c.o -o bin/3dview  -Wl,-rpath,/home/will/Template/build/dependencies/freeglut-3.8.0/lib /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLU.so lib/libglut.so.3.13.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libX11.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so -lm
